summary: Therapy Consent Feature Testing Complete - Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%), Frontend: All UI flows verified. Consent auto-generation on case history completion, digital/paper signing, session notes blocking all working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test clients created with TEST_ prefix during testing for consent validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Therapy Consent feature fully tested. Consent auto-generates when case history is marked complete. Session notes blocked without signed consent.

seed_from_profile.notes: Returns basic identification data from client profile for seeding case history.

sync_to_profile.notes: Syncs case history basic identification back to client profile.

case_history_complete_generates_consent.notes: Completing case history auto-generates therapy consent with legal text.

get_therapy_consent.notes: Returns full consent with text, status, signature info.

sign_consent.notes: Supports digital and paper signature methods. Prevents re-signing.

session_notes_consent_blocking.notes: Session notes creation blocked with 400 error if consent not signed.

assistant_security.notes: Assistants blocked from case history and consent endpoints via role checks.

consent_text_content.notes: Consent text contains all 8 required sections: NATURE OF THERAPY, CONFIDENTIALITY, RISKS AND BENEFITS, FEES AND CANCELLATION, EMERGENCY CONTACT, TREATMENT PLAN, CLIENT RIGHTS, CONSENT.

full_consent_flow.notes: End-to-end flow: create client -> case history -> consent auto-generated -> sign -> session note allowed.

elements_verified: Amber warning box displayed when client has no case history
Warning text: 'No case history exists for this client. You must complete the initial case history before creating session notes.'
Blue info box displayed when consent needs signature
Warning text: 'Therapy consent has been generated and needs to be signed.'
Consent Signed status with green checkmark
Full consent text with all 8 sections
View Case History button visible when client has completed case history
View Consent button visible when consent exists

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/case-history/{client_id}/seed-from-profile - Seed basic info from profile
POST /api/case-history/{client_id}/sync-to-profile - Sync case history to profile
